build_version_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the build version of the image.

container_recipe_arn.description: The ARN of the container recipe used to create the image.

date_created.description: The date when the image was created.

distribution_configuration_arn.description: The ARN of the distribution configuration associated with the image.

enhanced_image_metadata_enabled.description: Indicates whether enhanced image metadata is enabled for the image.

id.description: The unique identifier for the image.

image_recipe_arn.description: The ARN of the image recipe used to create the image.

image_scanning_configuration.description: Configuration settings for scanning the image, including details on ECR repositories and tags.

image_tests_configuration.description: Configuration for testing the image, specifying if tests are enabled and the timeout duration.

infrastructure_configuration_arn.description: The ARN of the infrastructure configuration used during the image build.

os_version.description: The version of the operating system included in the image.

output_resources.description: The resources produced by the image build, including AMIs and container images.

platform.description: The platform of the image, such as Linux or Windows.

tags.description: Key-value pairs assigned to the image for identification and organization.

version.description: The version number of the image.
